CustomField.description: Required By date field on invoice to be fixed based on the no.of days entered in this field. The no.of days will be reduced from the 'Date Payment Due' on the invoice and set the 'Required By' date
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Required By date field on invoice to be fixed based on the no.of days entered in this field. The no.of days will be reduced from the 'Date Payment Due' on the invoice and set the 'Required By' date
CustomField.label: Invoice Required By Date Setting
